summary: Great‑sound recording featuring a killer Not Fade Away > Black Peter > Not Fade Away sequence and an explosive Round & Round
review: The tape captures a superb performance highlighted by the classic Not Fade Away → Black Peter → Not Fade Away sandwich, plus a soaring Round & Round that pushes the band into another level. Reviewers rave about the crystal‑clear sound quality, making this release both musically and technically outstanding.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are five‑star, praising both the performance (standout songs, flow) and the excellent sound quality; consistent positive feedback yields a high confidence rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the sound as great/crisp with no noted flaws or drop‑outs.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set flows brilliantly, especially the Not Fade Away > Black Peter > Not Fade Away sandwich that builds into an even higher‑energy Round & Round.
